claims.claim: We propose a Minimal Viable Experiment (MVE) to test the Resonant Coupling Hypothesis (RCH), which predicts that structured information couples to physical systems proportionally to algorithmic mutual information I_A(s; M_X).

axiom_hits.label: Distinction
axiom_hits.statement: The capacity for one thing to differ from another.

axiom_hits.label: Distinguishable States Are Real
axiom_hits.statement: Distinguishable states are real.

axiom_hits.statement: Axioms 4-6: Reality is grounded in a self-sustaining Logos field.

axiom_hits.statement: Information is equivalent to the existence of distinguishable states.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: A coherent information concept exists without distinguishable states.

axiom_hits.label: Self-Grounding Information Substrate
axiom_hits.statement: Reality requires a self-grounding information substrate: Logos.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: Information exists without substrate or finite substrate self-grounds without regress.

claims.claim: ### 2.1 Equipment **Quantum Random Number Generator:** - Model: ID Quantique Quantis-16M-USB or equivalent - Mode: Time-interval photon detection - Output rate: 16 Mbps - Interface: USB 2.0 **Modulation System:** - Coil: 15 cm diameter, 100 turns AWG-28 copper, shielded - Driver: Rigol DG4162 arbitrary waveform generator - Input encoding: Bitstream → bipolar voltage (±1V) - Coupling: Magnetic field modulation at 10 cm from QRNG **Environmental Control:** - Faraday cage: Copper mesh, 6-sided, grounded - Temperature: Monitored at ±0.1°C (target: 20.0°C) - Humidity: Logged (passive control) - EM shielding: RF-absorbing foam lining **Data Acquisition:** - PC: Intel i7, 32GB RAM, SSD - Software: Custom Python 3.11 + NumPy/SciPy - Logging: All raw bits timestamped, SHA-256 per block

axiom_hits.kill_condition: Find another ethical system that independently derives love your enemies from first principles without Jesus or Christian tradition.

axiom_hits.label: Grace Phase Transition
axiom_hits.statement: R-sweep from negative to positive produces a threshold-dependent discrete phase transition from chi<0 to chi>0 when J_grace crosses threshold.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: The sign change is smooth, internally generated, or reversible without external energy input.

axiom_hits.label: Grounding Block
axiom_hits.statement: Axioms 4-6: Reality is grounded in a self-sustaining Logos field.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: Information can exist without substrate, or substrate can ground itself finitely without regress.

axiom_hits.label: Observation Block
axiom_hits.statement: Axioms 7-9: Actualized by observers; the chain terminates in God.
axiom_hits.kill_condition: Observation is unnecessary for actualization, or the Von Neumann chain terminates in a finite observer.

axiom_hits.kill_condition: Moral facts are not real, or sign can self-flip through effort, will, or technique.
